completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with one part (Laravel 12 backend + React 19 frontend in same repo); project_type=web. Two parallel HTTP surfaces detected (Inertia/web + REST API /api/v1).

Inventoried existing docs: README.md, DOCKER.md, TESTING.md, PROJECT_CONTEXT.md, CLAUDE.md (root); docs/oveview.md, BACKEND_DISCREPANCIES.md, IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md, PAYPAL_INTEGRATION.md, api/specifications.md, architecture/{system.md,data-model.md}, requirements/user-stories.md, tickets/TASK-CM-001..027, PR/1authentication.md.

Tech stack: Laravel 12 (PHP 8.2+) + Sanctum + Inertia 2 + Eloquent on MariaDB 10.11 + Redis 7 + React 19 + TS 5.7 + Vite 6 + Tailwind 4 + Shadcn/Radix + PayPal v2 REST. Architecture pattern: layered monolith with two HTTP surfaces.

Exhaustive scan: read all 64 PHP files in app/, all routes, 12 migrations, all factories/seeders, key React (app.tsx, CartContext, lib/api.ts, lib/axios.ts, lib/address-api.ts, types/index.d.ts, hooks/use-addresses.ts), Dockerfiles, docker-compose, GH workflows, vite/cypress/phpunit configs. 13 API endpoints catalogued, 8 domain tables, 9 lifecycle invariants, 3 services.
Generated source-tree-analysis.md with annotated tree of top-level, app/, resources/js/, database/, routes/, tests/, cypress/.
Dev/deploy info extracted from Makefile, README, DOCKER.md, TESTING.md, .env.example, docker-compose.yml, Dockerfiles, .github/workflows/. Wrote development-guide.md and deployment-guide.md.

Wrote architecture.md (single-part) covering style, components, data flows (mermaid sequence diagrams for catalog/add-to-cart/checkout/PayPal callbacks), cross-cutting concerns, and 10 architecture decisions with trade-offs.

Wrote project-overview.md, data-models.md (with full ER diagram and lifecycle invariants), api-contracts.md (endpoint-by-endpoint, including the address-routes-in-web.php quirk and the public PayPal endpoints flag), component-inventory.md (pages, layouts, hooks, contexts, lib API modules).
Wrote master index.md with quick reference, generated docs links, existing docs links, top-10 cross-cutting things to know, verification recap.
Validation complete: 0 incomplete markers found (no '(To be generated)', no fuzzy variants). 9 docs written totaling ~120KB markdown.

findings.technology_stack: Laravel 12, PHP 8.2+, MariaDB 10.11, Redis 7, React 19, TypeScript 5.7, Vite 6, Tailwind 4, Shadcn/Radix, PayPal v2 REST
findings.api_surface: 13 controllers under app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/, 6 admin routes, 5 cart routes, 5 PayPal routes, 4 auth routes, 3 product/category routes, 3 user routes, 7 address routes (in routes/web.php)
findings.data_models: 8 domain tables (users, categories, products, carts, cart_items, addresses, orders, order_items) + Sanctum + Laravel infra
open_issues: Payment/Success and Payment/Cancel React pages not implemented
movement_type values inconsistent (factory English vs seeder Spanish)
Tests have nested duplicate folders (Feature/Feature/, Unit/Unit/)

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To rescan, delete or archive this file.
